label: CT + radiation-induced cancer
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("radiation-induced cancer"[tiab] OR "radiation induced cancer"[tiab])

label: CT + lifetime attributable / carcinogenic risk
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("lifetime attributable risk"[tiab] OR "carcinogenic risk"[tiab])

label: CT + radiation dose + risk
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND "radiation dose"[tiab] AND risk[tiab]

label: CT + risk of not scanning / non-scanning
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("risk of not scanning"[tiab] OR "not scanning"[tiab] OR "non-scanning"[tiab])

label: withholding / deferred / forgoing CT or imaging
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("withholding CT"[tiab] OR "deferred CT"[tiab] OR "forgoing CT"[tiab] OR "withholding imaging"[tiab] OR "deferred imaging"[tiab] OR "forgoing imaging"[tiab])

label: delayed CT / CT delay / time to CT
query: ("delayed CT"[tiab] OR "CT delay"[tiab] OR "time to CT"[tiab] OR "delayed computed tomography"[tiab])

label: MeSH: CT AND Delayed Diagnosis (broad proxy)
CT + delayed diagnosis / diagnostic delay (broad proxy)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("delayed diagnosis"[tiab] OR "diagnostic delay"[tiab])
